name: Daily Review
description: Orchestrate your daily data gathering, inbox processing, and planning session. Pulls browser history, AI transcripts, messages, and calendar to build a complete picture of your day.

name: Weekly Review
description: Saturday review and planning session that evaluates progress against OKRs, processes leftover inbox items, and sets priorities for the coming week.

name: Process Inbox
description: Process messages and notifications through GTD methodology. Classifies items as actionable, reference, or trash, then routes them to the right project or agent.

name: Scrum Standup
description: Check the status of all running agent tasks and worktrees. Reports what each agent accomplished, what is in progress, and flags any blockers or stale work.

name: Suggest Tasks
description: Scan all active projects, open issues, and OKRs to propose a prioritized list of tasks for the current sprint or day. Considers deadlines, dependencies, and strategic value.

name: Google Workspace
description: Perform Google Workspace operations including Gmail search, Calendar event management, and Drive file operations. Your bridge to the Google ecosystem.

name: Dispatch Approved Tasks
description: Launch approved tasks from your task board by spinning up agent sessions in parallel. Each task gets its own worktree and tmux session for isolated execution.

name: Process Notion Inbox
description: Process cards in your Notion task board inbox. Adds S3 analysis, assigns to the right agent, sets priority, and moves cards to the appropriate status column.

name: Execute Notion Task
description: Pick up a task card from your project board and execute it end-to-end. Reads the card context, performs the work, updates status, and reports results back to the card.

name: Add to Notion Database
description: Add items to any Notion database with proper schema mapping. Handles property types, relations, and formatting automatically.

name: Implement GitHub Issue
description: Take a GitHub issue and implement it end-to-end: read the spec, create a branch, write code, run tests, and open a pull request. Full development cycle from issue to PR.

name: Develop Tickets by ID
description: Work on one or more tickets by their ID. Reads the ticket spec, checks out or creates a branch, implements the changes, and prepares them for review.

name: Pick Next Issue
description: Automatically select the highest-priority unassigned issue from your backlog based on labels, milestones, and dependencies, then start working on it.

name: Run Sprint
description: Dispatch all issues in the current sprint milestone in parallel. Each issue gets its own agent session and worktree for independent, concurrent development.

name: Sprint Planning
description: Plan upcoming sprints by reviewing the backlog, estimating stories, grouping by theme, and creating a milestone with balanced workload across available capacity.

name: Story Point Estimation
description: Estimate effort for issues using story points. Analyzes complexity, unknowns, and scope to assign consistent estimates across your backlog.

name: PR Review Responder
description: Address pull request review comments systematically. Reads all feedback, implements changes, responds to discussions, and ensures all threads are resolved before re-requesting review.

name: Review All Open PRs
description: Scan all open pull requests across your repositories, address review comments, fix failing CI, and push updates. Batch process for clearing the PR backlog.

name: Dependency Vulnerability Report
description: Security audit of project dependencies. Scans for known vulnerabilities, outdated packages, and license issues, then produces a prioritized report with remediation steps.

name: Nuxt SEO Audit
description: Comprehensive SEO audit for Nuxt applications. Checks meta tags, structured data, sitemap, robots.txt, performance metrics, and indexing issues specific to Nuxt's rendering modes.

name: Content & SEO Agent
description: Full content pipeline: SEO audits, keyword research, blog post drafting, content calendar management, and performance tracking. Turns your expertise into discoverable content.

name: Viral Threads
description: Transform long-form content into engaging social media threads. Extracts key insights, structures them for maximum engagement, and formats for platform-specific requirements.

name: Social Media Post
description: Cross-platform content distribution. Adapts a single piece of content for multiple platforms (blog, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Telegram) with platform-appropriate formatting and hashtags.

name: Post to X/Twitter
description: Compose and post tweets and threads to X/Twitter. Handles character limits, thread splitting, media attachments, and optimal posting times.

name: Brand Poster Generator
description: Generate marketing posters and graphics that match your brand guidelines. Produces event flyers, product announcements, and social media cards with consistent visual identity.

name: AI Image Generation (Gemini)
description: Generate images using Google Gemini's image capabilities. Create illustrations, diagrams, social media graphics, and concept art from text descriptions.

name: Image from HTML/CSS
description: Generate pixel-perfect images from HTML and CSS designs. Ideal for social cards, open graph images, email headers, and any graphic that benefits from programmatic control.

name: Image from LaTeX
description: Create crisp vector graphics and diagrams from LaTeX code. Perfect for mathematical formulas, technical diagrams, flowcharts, and publication-quality figures.

name: AI Video Generation (Gemini)
description: Generate short video clips using Google Gemini's video capabilities. Create promotional clips, explainers, and visual content from text descriptions.

name: Video Podcast Producer
description: Split long-form video recordings into short clips, generate thumbnails, transcribe audio, and create chapter markers. Full post-production pipeline for video content.

name: Local Audio Transcription
description: Transcribe audio and video files locally using faster-whisper. Runs on your machine for privacy, supports multiple languages, and outputs timestamped text.

name: Website Voice Audit
description: Audit your website for brand voice consistency. Analyzes tone, language patterns, and messaging alignment across all pages to ensure a coherent brand experience.

name: YouTube Metadata Optimizer
description: Optimize YouTube video titles, descriptions, tags, and chapter markers for discoverability. Analyzes competition and search trends to maximize organic reach.

name: QR Code Generator
description: Generate QR codes with embedded UTM tracking parameters. Creates branded codes for events, business cards, and marketing materials with built-in analytics.

name: Startup Coach
description: Structured business coaching from mission/vision through hypothesis validation to JTBD analysis and story mapping. Challenges assumptions and keeps you focused on what matters.

name: User Story Writer
description: Transform vague requirements into well-structured INVEST user stories. Includes acceptance criteria, edge cases, and technical notes ready for sprint planning.

name: Project Kickoff
description: Full project initialization from README to user journey to story map to architecture decisions. Sets up the foundation for a new product or feature from scratch.

name: Sales & Business Development
description: Manage your sales pipeline from lead generation through outreach to deal tracking. Research prospects, craft personalized messages, and track conversion metrics.

name: Freelance Job Hunt
description: Search freelance platforms for matching opportunities based on your skills and rates. Filters by budget, tech stack, and timeline, then prepares tailored proposals.

name: Storyteller Tactics
description: Craft compelling narratives for pitches, presentations, and content. Uses proven storytelling frameworks to make your message memorable and persuasive.

name: Portfolio & Hiring Analysis
description: Analyze your project portfolio to identify skill gaps and hiring needs. Maps capabilities against requirements and recommends where to bring in help or build new skills.

name: Personal Coaching Session
description: Guided coaching conversation using assessment data, check-in history, and journaling. Helps you reflect, unblock, and reconnect with your purpose using Socratic questioning.

name: Year in Review
description: Comprehensive life assessment using the Level 10 Life framework. Scores 10 life areas, identifies patterns over time, and creates an actionable plan for the next quarter.

name: Figma to Code
description: Translate Figma designs into production code. Reads design specs, extracts tokens, and implements pixel-accurate components with proper responsive behavior.

name: Improve Existing Skill
description: Analyze an existing skill's performance, identify gaps or inefficiencies, and produce an improved version. Uses conversation history and error patterns as improvement signals.

name: Meta Skill Decomposition
description: Break down complex skills into smaller, reusable sub-skills. Identifies shared patterns across skills and creates a modular skill architecture.

name: Multi-Step Workflow
description: Orchestrate complex multi-step tasks with planning, execution, and verification phases. Breaks large goals into ordered steps and manages state between them.

name: Export Chat History
description: Export AI chat transcripts from various sources into structured markdown files. Captures session metadata, timestamps, and conversation content for review and analysis.
